scope_note: QA Phase-Conjugate Morphogenetic Memory Cert [521]. Primary sources: (Levin, 2021) DOI 10.3389/fnsys.2021.768201; (Pezzulo & Levin, 2015) DOI 10.1039/c5ib00221d; (Hopfield, 1982) DOI 10.1073/pnas.79.8.2554; (Soffer, 1986) DOI 10.1364/OL.11.000118. Levin M. (2021) 'Technological Approach to Mind Everywhere' Front. Syst. Neurosci. 15:768201; Pezzulo G. & Levin M. (2015) 'Re-membering the body: top-down control of regeneration' Integr. Biol. 7:1487-1517. CLAIM (demonstrated + mechanism-certified): Michael Levin's bioelectric morphogenesis -- the target morphology stored as an attractor, tissue navigating back to it from damaged/perturbed states (regeneration) -- is realized as the cert [519] phase-conjugate associative memory (on cert [518]'s exact conjugator). Body plans are 2D QA phase fields; stored as attractors; a DAMAGED (amputated) field regrows to the correct target by content-addressable recall. KEY MECHANISM (certified deterministically on synthetic body plans, NO external data): (a) regeneration -- an amputated body plan recalls to the exact stored target; (b) which-morphology -- a damaged plan converges to its OWN plan, not another; (c) no-chimera -- the regrown field is an exact stored plan, never a mixture; (d) systemic tolerance -- a global bioelectric shift (probe -> qa_add(probe,phi)) breaks naive regeneration but PHASE-LOCKED recall (the [518] phase-conjugate mirror self-locking to the perturbing medium) restores the correct morphology in the shifted frame. Empirical record (reference impl qa_morphogenetic_memory.py, m=24, 16x16 field, axiom-linter clean): regeneration fidelity 1.000 and correct-plan 1.000 up to 87.5% contiguous amputation (only 12.5% tissue remaining); correlated morphologies (24 variants of 4 plans, 75% shared) regenerate 1.000 up to 62.5% amputation; no-chimera rate 1.000; systemic-perturbation naive regen 0.000 for phi>=3 vs phase-locked 1.000 for all phi. HONEST LIMITS: high robustness reflects the high-redundancy large-alphabet field (4-24 near-orthogonal plans over 256 cells), degrading only as plans approach identical or amputation nears 100%; distinct from qa_brainca_morphogenesis_v3.py (organizer-cell CA on a single target) -- this stores MULTIPLE body plans with content-addressable regeneration. Checks REGEN/WHICH_PLAN/NO_CHIMERA/SYSTEMIC_PHASE_LOCK/NAIVE_SYSTEMIC_FAILS/OVERLAP_MATCH/A1_RANGE/SRC/F. Builds on certs [518],[519]; companion to cert [520] (EEG recall). Author: Will Dale + Claude 2026-07-09.
